specific_question: In a 2024 market survey done by the marketing department of MediConn, what percentage of Canadians agreed that 'AI-assisted consultation could build confidence' in telehealth?
answer: In April 2024, 71% of Canadians agreed that AI-assisted consultation could boost their trust and confidence in telehealth.
dr_question: Starting in 2026 through Q1 2027, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the use of AI in creating the right patient experience, starting from the first touch point through care delivery and follow up to increase the number of patients that engage with their tele-health services?
